text:
-Wl, --export-dynamic must be both Makefile and Makefile.interface files
(PR 174939). Another way moved it LDFLAGS to place before .if
!defined(PKGNAMESUFFIX).

With Timidity++ can use audio/eawplus instead audio/eawpats, because format
timidity.cfg from eawplus support only Timidity++ (used new option for
tonebank).

-- 
sorry for bad english.
